title: diasperus lamprophyllus
intro: Diasperus lamprophyllus, also known as the "Yellow Jasmine", is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diasperus lamprophyllus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. Diasperus lamprophyllus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it accessible for various herbal preparations.
